Newsletter

Q2 2026 Edition

  

  

  

Blissville Terraces: The Sangotedo Inflection Point

  
  

As we speak, Sangotedo is outperforming matured districts like Ajah, with property values in this corridor appreciating at an average of 50% annually. For Blissville Terraces, located within the prestigious Caribbean Lake City Estate, this means your investment isn’t just beating inflation, it is poised to double your equity every 24 months.

  

Our physical progress is moving just as fast as the market. We are thrilled to share that we have hit these major milestones over the past quarter:

•

Completed all soil investigations and preliminary engineering. 

•

Finalized the master architectural and engineering designs. 

•

Secured statutory permits and approvals.

•

Developed 75% of the building frame for Block 1. 

•

Achieved 80% of the substructure for Block 2. 

•

Construction of the gate structure is done.

  
  

Gate House Structure with the Installed Gates

  
  

Second Floor Columns Formwork

  
  
  

Pile Caps Rebar Works of Building 2

  

Utilizing Scientific Tools for Quality Assurance

  
  
  
  

Ongoing Block work of Building 1

  
  

Second Floor Beam and Slab of Building 1

  
  

The transformation is no longer just on paper; it’s in the air. The Omu Creek Bridge projects are now acting as "silent wealth creators," linking us to the Lagos-Calabar Coastal Road. This April, the vision of bypassing traffic via the Estate Jetty and reaching Victoria Island in record time is becoming a tangible lifestyle advantage for our residents.

  

For you, this month represents a final window. With the proposed July 15th completion of the Ajah road expansion fast approaching, the "infrastructure jump" in pricing is imminent.

Inside the estate, we are doubling down on our philosophy: Optimal living is a necessity, not a luxury. From the 24/7 security to the "Blue Mind" advantage of living steps away from a natural lake, Blissville is being built for the high-performing individual who demands a community of like-minded achievers.
